label: AI Data Centers Threaten Great Lakes

comments.text: The Great Lakes could be at risk due to data centers powering AI, a study warns. blockclubchi.co/45UDVKm

I’m usually among the first to champion your policies, but the decision to bring a datacenter to WI runs an extremely high risk of poisoning our Great Lakes. The environmental toll of these centers is detrimental to everything that makes WI great. I’m deeply concerned with this judgment.

The Great Lakes Compact doesn’t require reporting of #datacenters’ water use when they tap municipal systems. Prof. Melissa Scanlan warns this hides major water & #energy demands and urges more transparency + long-term regional planning. .bsky.social www.wuwm.com/are-there-ru...

"Data centers powering artificial intelligence are putting a strain on Lake Michigan and other local water systems, which could lead to water shortages if not addressed, according to a recent report from the Alliance for the Great Lakes." AI is putting our water sources at risk.

"Great Lakes states like Michigan risk overtaxing water supplies by rushing to woo hyperscale data centers without closely analyzing whether local aquifers and water utilities can fulfill the facilities’ massive water demands."
